_status: FROZEN 2026-06-16. Immutable once agent runs start (Codex rule). Any addition = new experiment / explicitly flagged post hoc.
_phase: Phase 0 — auth-lens A/B (A0 generic  vs  A1 generic + access-control clause)

_arms.A0: generic: 'evaluate this file for security issues' (bare-bones, exp05-style)
_arms.A1: generic + ONE access-control clause (who can reach each handler; nonce != authorization; missing current_user_can = broken access control)

_design: 8 files, no structural context in either arm, model claude-sonnet-4-6, 3 reps/arm, randomized file+arm order, no arm labels in prompt.
_scoring: POSITIVE catch = arm emits a finding with vuln_class in {broken_access_control, missing_authorization, privilege_escalation} at an acceptable_location (named handler OR file-level registrar/dispatcher counts). NEGATIVE FP = arm emits any such access-control finding on a negative file. Severity of the positive is irrelevant to the catch (label is a CODE property: reachable handler lacks current_user_can).
_size_covariate: lines recorded per file; large files dilute BOTH arms, so the A1-A0 contrast remains valid, but absolute recall is reported split by size band.

acceptable_locations: file-level: AJAX dispatch missing capability check
positives.required_evidence: AJAX reaches actionIndex with only validateToken() nonce, no current_user_can; any logged-in user can enumerate media dir + leak fullPath
ajax_paginate() calls only UM()->check_ajax_nonce() (frontend nonce, anon-obtainable) and no current_user_can; fires um_ajax_load_posts__* hooks
get_icons() calls only UM()->admin()->check_ajax_nonce() and no current_user_can; any logged-in user who has the admin nonce can call it
dismiss_notice() calls only UM()->admin()->check_ajax_nonce() and no current_user_can; the current_user_can('manage_options') at line ~151 is a DIFFERENT function (not the AJAX dismiss path)

hard_negatives.why_negative: ajax_scanner handler is correctly gated: wp_verify_nonce('um-admin-nonce') AND current_user_can('manage_options') (line ~33). Flagging an access-control bug here = FP.
secure-scan path gated by wp_verify_nonce('um-admin-nonce') AND current_user_can('manage_options') (line ~213). Flagging access control = FP.
do_ajax_product_export() gated by check_ajax_referer('wc-product-export') AND export_allowed() (current_user_can('edit_products') && current_user_can('export')). Flagging access control = FP.

easy_negatives.why_negative: pure formatting helpers; no request-reachable handler, no AJAX/REST registration. Any access-control finding here is a hallucination. Sanity subset.
